prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校核心专业属化工、材料大类，社会舆论中"生化环材"整体偏劝退，但化工学科评估A级、双学士学位项目（化工+大数据、材料+大数据等）提升了专业吸引力；计算机类、自动化类等热门工科专业热度持续偏高；云南省2026年高考总报名人数约37.79万，较2025年约28.57万大幅增加，竞争压力上升；北京化工大学位于北京市，属一线城市，对西南省份考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7049名、2026年小幅扩招（+1人）、软科排名显著上升（+6位）、抖音高热关注度、云南省考生总数大幅增加等因素，扩招带来的竞争缓解效应有限，而学校排名上升和考生总数增加共同推动竞争加剧。预测2026年最低位次约7071名，区间6571–7571名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 7904 → 8432 → 7897 → 7423 → 7049. In the past three years, the ranking has moved forward overall (decreasing number), with a baseline of about 7049 in 2025, a decrease of about 374 places compared to 2024, indicating intensifying competition. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Yunnan Province was 51 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 54 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 59 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 60, an increase of 1 from 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.7%, having a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 6 places from 63rd in 2025, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (involving a teacher ethics investigation incident, which the school handled according to law and regulations). Douyin heat total ranking 7th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms. Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly commented, 'A cost-effective Ministry of Education directly affiliated Double First-Class,' indicating high application attention. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Fifth round of discipline evaluation: Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Chemistry (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), with outstanding disciplinary strength in the chemical engineering field, highly consistent with the school's characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The school's core majors are in chemical engineering and materials. In public opinion, 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' are generally discouraged, but the A-level evaluation of chemical engineering and dual-degree programs (chemical engineering + big data, materials + big data, etc.) enhance the attractiveness of majors. Popular engineering majors such as computer science and automation continue to have high heat. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Province college entrance examination is about 377,900, a significant increase from about 285,700 in 2025, increasing competitive pressure. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7049, a small expansion in 2026 (+1 person), a significant rise in Soft Science ranking (+6 places), high Douyin heat attention, and a substantial increase in the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province, the competition relief effect from expansion is limited, while the rise in school ranking and increase in candidate numbers jointly drive intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 7071, with a range of 6571 to 7571.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy) (Chemical Engineering and Technology Elite Class, Polymer Materials and Engineering Elite Class, Bioengineering High-End Class)
- Chemistry (Basic Top-Notch) (Chemistry Base Class/Excellent Training Class)
- Automation (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Computer Science (Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Robotics Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics Electronics and Management) (Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application, Electronic Science and Technology, etc.)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials) (Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy and Biomedicine) (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Energy Chemical Engineering, Hydrogen Energy Science and Engineering, Bioengineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry) (Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Resource Chemistry)
- Bioengineering (Bioengineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6571–7571, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6571), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Hongde Academy, computer science, and other popular majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7571), you should mainly choose Tier 3 engineering experimental classes, while also considering Tier 2 dual-degree programs. The school has outstanding strengths in chemical engineering and materials, and the dual-degree programs (chemical engineering + big data, materials + big data) combine disciplinary advantages with employment expansion, making them worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 2288 → 2148 → 2627 → 2789 → 2020, with significant fluctuations. In 2025, there was a substantial forward shift (ranking number decreased by 769), with a baseline of about 2020. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Yunnan Province was 9 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 9 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and 6 in 2026. In recent years, it has shown a slight reduction followed by stabilization. In 2026, it remains the same as 2025, with no competition changes due to plan adjustments.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 6 places from 63rd in 2025, with continuous improvement in ranking, which also has overall appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2024, reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed. Douyin heat total ranking 7th (high heat), with high overall attention to the school. No abnormal records of liberal arts admissions were found. The school's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in chemical engineering, materials, chemistry, and other science and engineering fields. Liberal arts majors (such as Business Administration, Law, English, etc.) lack A-level discipline evaluation support, but Business Administration, relying on the school's overall 211 platform, still has certain competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Business Administration (New Liberal Arts, Economics, Management, and Law), English, etc. Business Administration/Business Management has a clear social cooling trend, while English/Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Province college entrance examination is about 377,900, a significant increase from 2025, with the scale of history category candidates expanding simultaneously, leading to increased competition pressure. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to liberal arts candidates from southwestern provinces. The school's liberal arts enrollment plan is small (only 6 people), resulting in high competition concentration.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2020, the unchanged enrollment plan, the rise in Soft Science ranking, high Douyin heat attention, and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province, the unchanged plan combined with the expansion of candidate scale and increased overall attention to the school jointly drive intensified competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 1990, with a range of 1632–2348.
